author: y4rr
content: Plan: The sprint brief mentions Tokio, but reviewing checkpoint.rs reveals AsyncCheckpointer uses std::thread (not async/await), so no Tokio runtime is needed. Tests: (1) async save -> wait -> load round-trip, (2) sequential saves (second save waits for first), (3) is_saving() flag state. Write conformance_serialize_async.rs. Remove cascade_skip in conformance_serialize.rs and #852 exclusion entry from _surface_exclusions.toml.
